name: Yunnan Jianzhijia Health-Chain Co., Ltd.
summary: Yunnan Jianzhijia Health-Chain Co., Ltd. operates a chain of drugstores and pharmacies, providing pharmaceutical products, healthcare products, and related services. The company is based in Yunnan, China, and focuses on expanding its network of retail outlets to serve the healthcare needs of local communities. They aim to offer accessible and reliable healthcare solutions.
